name: Bisabolol
description: A naturally occurring terpene from chamomile renowned for its exceptional skin-calming and healing properties.
scientificSummary: Clinical studies show bisabolol inhibits NF-kB signaling pathway, directly reducing the production of pro-inflammatory compounds.
mechanismOfAction: Inhibits 5-lipoxygenase and NF-kB, reducing prostaglandin E2 and cytokine production while also acting as a penetration enhancer.

seo.title: Bisabolol - Chamomile's Ultimate Soothing Extract | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore the science of Alpha-Bisabolol and how it calms reactive skin and aids healing.
